# socialrunclubs.de

> A directory of Social Run Clubs in Germany.

socialrunclubs.de is a website that lists Social Run Clubs across Germany.
It provides an overview of running communities by city, with information about each club including descriptions, links to Instagram, Strava, WhatsApp, and club websites, as well as maps of meeting points.

## Pages

- [Home](https://socialrunclubs.de/): Overview and search for Social Run Clubs in Germany
- [All Cities](https://socialrunclubs.de/cities.html): Browse Social Run Clubs by city
- [All Clubs](https://socialrunclubs.de/clubs.html): Alphabetical list of all Social Run Clubs in Germany
- [Tags](https://socialrunclubs.de/tags.html): Browse Social Run Clubs by category/tag
- [Blog Posts](https://socialrunclubs.de/post/): Articles about Social Run Clubs

## Technical Notes

- Data is sourced from a Google Sheets spreadsheet and regenerated regularly
- Site is a statically generated HTML website
- Source code: https://github.com/flopp/socialrunclubs-de
